name: Hours and Location
description: A section displaying business hours in a formatted table alongside location details with an embedded map. Shows current open/closed status dynamically.
whenToUse: Use on local business websites to display operating hours and physical location. Essential for restaurants, salons, clinics, and retail stores.

props.name: hours
props.description: Object mapping days to open/close times

props.name: showMap
props.description: Whether to show an embedded map
